<!-- Thanks for contributing! Fill in the sections below. Delete sections
     that don't apply (e.g. "Screenshots" for backend-only PRs). -->

## Summary

<!-- 1–3 sentences: what does this PR change and why? Focus on the WHY —
     the diff tells the reader the WHAT. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Tick all that apply. -->

- [ ] `feat` — new user-facing functionality
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — internal change, no behaviour difference
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `docs` — docs only
- [ ] `chore` — tooling / deps / CI / config
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `style` — styling only (CSS / formatting)

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this works? Bulleted checkboxes so reviewers can
     replay the same checks locally. Prefer real commands / clicks over
     "it works on my machine". -->

- [ ] `make test` passes locally
- [ ] `make lint` passes locally
- [ ] Manually verified the happy path
- [ ] Manually verified the error/edge cases

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For any UI change, add before/after screenshots or a short screen
     recording. Delete this section if the PR is backend-only. -->

## Database / migration notes

<!-- Did you add an Alembic migration? Is it reversible? Any manual steps
     on deploy? Delete this section if no schema changes. -->

## Breaking changes

<!-- API shape, env var rename, behavior shift that clients need to know
     about. "None" if N/A. -->

## Related

<!-- Links to issues, prior PRs, discussions. "Closes #123" if it resolves
     an issue. -->
